title: Dentists dataset
description: Scraped dentists and dental practices from Google Maps with contact details, specialties, payment options, insurances accepted, languages, services, booking detection, and practice-type / DSO classification.

defaultDataset.title: Dentists
defaultDataset.description: Dataset containing scraped dentists / dental practices with 35+ fields including contact info, social media, specialties, payment options, insurances accepted, languages spoken, services list, review sentiment, online booking detection, new-patient promos, metro classification, and DSO/practice-type classification.
